findings.location: s1 section body and s1 hints
findings.description: The class names "AbstractHttpRequestTestSupport" and "BasicHttpRequestTestSupport" do not exist in the source. The source table lists "AbstractHttpReqestTestSupport" and "BasicHttpReqestTestSupport" (typos missing 'u'), but the correct class names — confirmed by the Structure section headings — are "AbstractHttpRequestTestTemplate" and "BasicHttpRequestTestTemplate". The knowledge file corrected the spelling typo but changed "Template" to "Support", producing class names that appear nowhere in the source. An AI using this file would search for a nonexistent "AbstractHttpRequestTestSupport" class.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: `|| AbstractHttpReqestTestSupport` / `|| BasicHttpReqestTestSupport`. Source Structure section headings: `BasicHttpRequestTestTemplate` and `AbstractHttpRequestTestTemplate`. Neither "AbstractHttpRequestTestSupport" nor "BasicHttpRequestTestSupport" appears in the source.
